PROFESSIONAL EXHIBITION AND SCIENTIFIC FORUM

Casablanca hosts the 7th edition of the International Exhibition of Dental Health DENTAL EXPO 2026, and this, from  07 to 10 May 2026 organized by the agency ATELIER VITA.

DENTAL EXPO is the largest African event that regroups all oral health professionals not only at national but also at international level. The number of visits received during the previous editions, shows that the exhibition has become the largest African platform of the oral health sector recognized at the international level.

Read more
